focalfunc:
func newNode(
	t kind,
	pre string,
	p *node,
	sc children,
	originalPath string,
	methods *routeMethods,
	paramsCount int,
	paramChildren,
	anyChildren *node,
	notFoundHandler *routeMethod,
) *node
funcbody:
func newNode(
	t kind,
	pre string,
	p *node,
	sc children,
	originalPath string,
	methods *routeMethods,
	paramsCount int,
	paramChildren,
	anyChildren *node,
	notFoundHandler *routeMethod,
) *node {
	return &node{
		kind:			t,
		label:			pre[0],
		prefix:			pre,
		parent:			p,
		staticChildren:		sc,
		originalPath:		originalPath,
		methods:		methods,
		paramsCount:		paramsCount,
		paramChild:		paramChildren,
		anyChild:		anyChildren,
		isLeaf:			sc == nil && paramChildren == nil && anyChildren == nil,
		isHandler:		methods.isHandler(),
		notFoundHandler:	notFoundHandler,
	}
}
